---
title: "VideoCodec"
---
<!-- DO NOT EDIT! This file was auto-generated by crates/build/re_types_builder/src/codegen/docs/website.rs -->

The codec used to encode video stored in [`components.VideoChunk`](https://rerun.io/docs/reference/types/components/video_chunk).

## Variants
#### `H264` = 1
H.264 (AVC)

#### `H265` = 2
H.265 (HEVC)

#### `AV1` = 3
AV1

#### `VP8` = 4
VP8

#### `VP9` = 5
VP9


## Arrow datatype
```
uint8
```
